prompt: Create a low-resolution, candid indoor family snapshot with an unsettling hyper-realistic AI-photo feel, shot at a slight clockwise tilt with a wide-angle phone camera and harsh ceiling-light glare. The scene is a cramped apartment dining/living room with glossy white tile floor, white walls, a bright window with beige curtains in the back left, a dark sofa or cabinet near the window, a wall-mounted water dispenser in the center background, shelves and bottles cluttered in the upper right, and everyday household objects scattered around. Show exactly 3 people: on the left, a seated adult woman in a pale pink long-sleeve top holding a white bowl and chopsticks near the bottom edge; in the center background, a standing child wearing a puffy pink jacket and dark pants, holding something near the mouth; on the right foreground, a leaning adult man in a gray long-sleeve shirt and dark pants, reaching diagonally downward with chopsticks while pointing with his other hand. Cover all 3 faces with opaque rectangular pixelated blur censor blocks in muted brown-gray tones: one tall block over the woman’s face at the far left edge, one smaller block over the child’s face, and one large block over the man’s face. Keep the composition awkward and accidental, with motion blur, compression artifacts, soft focus, noisy shadows, washed-out colors, uneven exposure, and the feeling of an old compressed family photo. Use small Chinese apartment dining room, 3, opaque rectangular pixelated blur blocks, pink and gray, and tilted low-resolution phone snapshot. Do not add readable text, logos, watermarks, or extra people.
